positive: A vibrant, highly stylized geometric illustration of a whimsical mountain landscape at sunset. The scene features interlocking polygonal rock formations, abstract stylized flora (like crystalline ferns and glowing mushrooms), and a distant, stylized moon over a minimal body of water. The composition should be symmetrical and highly centered, creating a bold, clean silhouette perfect for t-shirt printing. Utilize a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, terracotta, and electric teal. The style must be flat graphic design, combining Art Deco geometric elements with modern minimalist vector art. High contrast, sharp edges, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blur, artifacts, low detail, watermark, signature, text, noisy, messy, photo-realistic, cinematic, gradient fade, grain, extra limbs, bad anatomy
